settings.text:
Thank you for shopping at Morpheus Furniture. We appreciate your business and strive to provide you with the highest quality bedroom furniture. Please read our Refund Policy carefully to understand our stance on refunds, exchanges, and cancellations.

1. No Refunds
We do not accept refunds for any of our products. All sales are final. Please ensure that you review your order carefully before making a purchase.

2. Exchange Policy
We only offer exchanges under the following conditions:

  • The bed has not been used.
  • The mattress and product are free of any stains, marks, or damage.

3. Damage Assessment
Any request for an exchange will be subject to a thorough inspection. If the product shows any signs of use, stains, or damage, the request for an exchange will be denied.

4. Cancellation Fee
If you wish to cancel your order, a 25% cancellation fee will be applied to the total purchase amount. This fee covers the costs associated with processing your order and preparing it for shipment.

5. How to Request an Exchange
To request an exchange, please follow these steps:

  1. Contact our Customer Service team at support@morpheusfurniture.co.za or 061 852 3328 within 2 days of receiving your product.
  2. Provide your order number and a detailed description of the issue.
  3. Await further instructions from our team regarding the inspection and exchange process.

6. Contact Us
For any questions or concerns regarding our Refund Policy, please contact us at:

Morpheus Furniture
Email: support@morpheusfurniture.co.za
Phone: 061 852 3328

By purchasing from Morpheus Furniture, you acknowledge that you have read and agree to this Refund Policy.
Join our email list for exclusive offers and the latest news.
